summary: Iteration 9 - Rebrand (SignalBeast -> Titan Trade) and Plan Management Testing. Backend: 19/20 tests passed (95%). Frontend: All rebrand and plan management features verified. Complete rebrand from SignalBeast to Titan Trade successful.

minor.issue: Health endpoint does not exist (returns 404) - not critical, other endpoints work

issues: 'Emergent' text detected in DOM (platform-injected badge) but hidden via CSS - this is expected behavior per main agent notes

backend: GET /api/market/live returns crypto, forex, indian data
frontend: Landing page shows 'Titan Trade' in nav, hero, footer
Sidebar shows 'Titan AI' instead of 'Beast AI'
Sidebar does NOT contain 'Admin' link (correctly hidden)
Chat page does NOT show 'Beast AI'
Pricing page shows 3 plans: Basic, Pro, Titan
Pricing page shows weekly prices: Basic 499, Pro 999, Titan 1,999
Pricing page shows monthly prices: Basic 1,499, Pro 3,499, Titan 6,999
Pricing page shows contact numbers 8102126223 and 8867678750
Admin page shows 'Access Denied' for non-admin user (testuser@test.com)
Admin page loads for admin user (contact.developersingh@gmail.com)
Admin page has 5 tabs: Overview, Users, Plans, Signals, System
Admin Plans tab has form with: email input, plan select (free/basic/pro/titan), billing cycle (weekly/monthly), custom days, custom hours
Admin Plans tab shows 'Assign Plan' button

admin_endpoints.POST /api/admin/plans/assign: Assigns plan by email with plan_name, billing_cycle, optional duration_days/hours

success_rate.backend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - only /api/health missing which is not critical)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all rebrand and plan management features verified)

seed_data_creation: Multiple plan assignments created during testing for testuser@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified the complete rebrand from SignalBeast to Titan Trade. All UI elements now show 'Titan Trade' and 'Titan AI'. The admin panel is hidden from sidebar navigation but accessible via /admin URL for admin user only. Plan management system is fully functional with endpoints for assigning plans (free/basic/pro/titan) with weekly/monthly billing cycles and optional custom duration in days or hours. Pricing page shows updated prices with weekly/monthly toggle. The Emergent badge is hidden via CSS but still present in DOM (platform-injected).
